description: Knowledge base for atlas-src. Sections cover architecture, services, pipeline, scoring, deployment, and benchmarks for on-demand retrieval via NEED_KB.

sections.title: ATLAS Architecture Overview
sections.description: High-level two-layer architecture: outer agent loop + inner V3 pipeline. Service stack and data flow summary.

sections.title: ATLAS Services (5-Service Stack)
sections.description: The 5 services: llama-server, atlas-proxy, v3-service, geometric-lens, sandbox. Ports, languages, startup order.

sections.title: Agent Loop (atlas-proxy)
sections.description: Atlas-proxy agent loop: grammar-constrained JSON, 8 tools, per-file tier classification, safety limits.

sections.title: V3 Pipeline (Inner Layer)
sections.description: V3 pipeline phases 0-3: probe, constraint-driven generation, verification/selection, repair strategies. 19 modules.

sections.title: Geometric Lens (Scoring, RAG, Routing)
sections.description: Geometric Lens: C(x) energy scoring, G(x) XGBoost, RAG/PageIndex, confidence routing, pattern cache.

sections.title: Sandbox (Isolated Code Execution)
sections.description: Sandbox service: 8-language isolated execution, build verification, linting, error classification, resource limits.

sections.title: Deployment (Docker, Bare Metal, K3s)
sections.description: Three deployment modes: Docker Compose, bare metal, K3s. VRAM budget, startup order, prerequisites.

sections.title: Benchmark Infrastructure and Results
sections.description: Benchmark runner, 9 dataset loaders, V3 ablation results (74.6% LCB), analysis utilities.

sections.title: Repository Structure and File Map
sections.description: Top-level directory layout, key file purposes, documentation index, test structure.

sections.title: Configuration and Environment Variables
sections.description: Environment variables, port assignments, atlas.conf settings, VRAM budget, Aider integration.

sections.title: Building and Setup
sections.description: Step-by-step build instructions for Docker Compose, bare metal, and K3s. Model download, first-run behavior, verification.

sections.title: CLI Usage and Workflow
sections.description: CLI launching, streaming output, status icons, workflow examples, REPL commands, tips for best results.

sections.title: Troubleshooting Guide
sections.description: Common issues by service: Docker/GPU, llama-server, proxy, Lens, sandbox. Quick diagnostics and fixes.

sections.title: Contributing and Development Workflow
sections.description: Development setup, code style (Python/Bash/YAML), testing, commit format, PR workflow.

sections.title: Worktree-Aware Operations
sections.description: Worktree-aware practices for agents: cogitor-managed files, common pitfalls (content edits on unread files, gitignore vs tracked), merge workflow.
